global.description: The ad features a prominent headline and a call-to-action button, with a clean layout.
global.main_message: Promoting hotel and flight bookings for the weekend.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, rounded rectangle shape in the center of the ad, filled with a solid color.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A smaller rounded rectangle shape overlaying the background, also filled with a solid color.

elements.label: Decorative circles
elements.description: Three circular shapes arranged horizontally, each filled with a solid color.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: Another rounded rectangle shape in the center, similar to ID 2 but slightly different in size.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A small rectangular button at the bottom with a solid color background and text indicating a reward.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape at the bottom, filled with a solid color.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular shape, similar to ID 6, positioned slightly to the right.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold text headline at the bottom, prominently displaying the message about weekend escapes.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Hotels + flights in one tap

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small text element displaying a price, positioned below the headline.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: A text logo at the top of the ad, displaying the name 'RouteBloom' in a bold font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, simple and modern, promoting weekend travel.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
